title: Review uncommitted diff for: 1) bugs/logic errors 2) security issues 3) code quality. Focus: new commit 3d70d338. Max 15 lines. If issues found, write 1-sentence fix.
summary_text: - Medium: [canon-v3-pipeline.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/scripts/canon-v3-pipeline.sh#L79) `3d70d338` writes `ci-pass.epoch` in the no-stage branch but does not call `on_success()` or advance `TASK_SEQ`, so after any prior CI failure the worker stays in exponential backoff and never records this path as a completed successful cycle. Fix: route the no-stage branch through the same success bookkeeping as the normal pass path. - Low, security: [freee-client.mjs](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/bookkeeping/scripts/freee-client.mjs#L24) `resolveEnvOrKeychain()` writes Keychain secrets back into `process.env`, which means every later child process from this Node process inherits OAuth credentials unnecessarily. Fix: keep the Keychain values in locals and inject them only into the `env` passed to the `freee-mcp` subprocess. - Low: [bookkeeping-engine.mjs](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/bookkeeping/scripts/bookkeeping-engine.mjs#L42) `toHankaku()` only converts U+FF01-U+FF5E, so common NFKC-equivalent inputs like full-width spaces still fail vendor matching and make the new normalization incomplete. Fix: normalize both strings with `normalize('NFKC')` before case-insensitive matching. No other obvious bugs or security issues stood out in the inspected diff.
